title: androcalva leichhardtii
intro: Androcalva leichhardtii, also known as Dampiera leichhardtii, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a member of the family Apocynaceae and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as wound healing and pain relief. Androcalva leichhardtii can be prepared as a tincture or extract for use in herbal remedies.
